name: Nasty Spider Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare your average cake mix according to the package instructions.
2. Bake it in two metal bowls, one larger than the other.
3. Once baked and cooled, cut the larger bowl (the "body") in half horizontally.
4. Carefully scoop out a cavity in each half of the body.
5. Fill the cavities with well-whipped Green Jello.
6. Reattach the halves to form the spider body.
7. Frost the entire cake black.
8. Arrange the cake on a serving platter.
9. Use licorice sticks as legs.
10. Place 2 large green gumdrops and 6 small ones for eyes.
11. When cutting into the cake, it will release a green "goo" that resembles what might be seen when a spider is stepped on.
12. Optionally, add a red hourglass shape to one side to enhance the toxic effect.
